utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Now there you go ! I would not want my best guest to strain her eyes !

emotion_cause.span: 1_I would not want my best guest to strain her eyes !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: What the smell from Joey ? No , I can hardly smell it over here .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Well you let me know if you can , because you know I can bake a pie to cover it .

emotion_cause.span: 5_I can bake a pie to cover it .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I can smell it a little , bake the pie .

emotion_cause.span: 6_I can smell it a little , bake the pie .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Hello ? Oh yes , one minute please . It is for you . It is the fire inspector .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh ! Hello ? Yeah this is Phoebe . Really ? !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah , so it turns out that it was not the hair straightener that started the fire .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: No ... no , it was the candles .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: It is very not good leaving candles unattended .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: In fact , one of the first things they teach you in fire school is ... Uhh ... Uhh ... Okay .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Well , I have to go now .
